title: Model failover queue
desc: When a provider faults (rate-limit, 5xx, network) before any reply is produced, the conversation automatically switches to the next usable candidate in this queue and keeps going. Applies to NOMI sessions only.
queueHint: Tried head-to-tail; the first enabled, healthy candidate that isn't the failed one is used.
empty: No candidates yet. Add a provider + model below.
duplicate: That provider + model is already in the queue.
maxSwitchesHint: Upper bound on switches within a single turn (also capped by the queue length).
stampUnhealthyHint: On switch, stamp the failed model as Unhealthy so it is skipped next time.
